regression_alert.description: Decider near-miss: attempted to integrate 4 stale 2026-04-11 analyst assessments (PRED-NEW-002, PRED-TOROID-003, W019, W020) that had been overridden by human approvals on 2026-04-14 (ISS-951/952/953/954). The morning's earlier decider run had JUST re-fixed the 209fda5 regression (ISS-1183/1184/1185/1186). This run's integration pass repeated the same pattern. REVERTED via git checkout before commit.
regression_alert.root_cause: Decider did not check closed-issues.json before integrating analyst assessments (ISS-1199/1200 describe exactly this gap). The divergence check only compared assessment verdict vs predictions.json current value — it did not verify whether the current value was a human-approved decision.
regression_alert.resolution: Immediately reverted. Correct human-approved verdicts preserved: PRED-NEW-002=standard_physics, PRED-TOROID-003=standard_physics, W019=falsified, W020=falsified.
regression_alert.action_required: The ISS-1199/1200 safeguard must be implemented: before integrating any analyst prediction assessment, check closed-issues.json for a verdict-change issue on that prediction_id closed within the last 30 days. If found, skip integration and flag for human review.

batch_1.summary: ISS-1074: Fixed broken daily_review.json URL (/api/current/ → /data/). ISS-1222: Removed 'return false' from WIN-058b onclick handlers. ISS-1237: Fixed Chapman attribution in SEC-8b.3 TLDR (Chapman gave qualitative mechanism; specific range comes from calibration). ISS-1239: Added PRED-TIER-2 definition+cross-link in SEC-8b.3. ISS-1232: Appended Part 3.1b condition-1 failure to WIN-062 verdict. ISS-1228/1196/1195/1131: Closed as already-resolved (verified in data).

batch_2.summary: WIN-053.c5 Major H1: Fixed TLDR factual error ('same location north' → 'opposite ends of disc'). Also fixed math error: formula is a cosh, not 'single exponential'. WIN-053.c5 Major H2: Fixed two broken cross-references ('Section 6.8: Globe Values Relabeled' → Section 6.4; dead §3.5.8 → WIN-012 anchor).

These are the intervals set by human on 2026-04-17 for canary-triggered reactive update. Human should review whether to restore to BAU defaults now that mode is BAU and backlog is cleared.

recommended_actions.action: IMPLEMENT ISS-1199/1200 SAFEGUARD: Add closed-issues.json pre-check to decider's prediction assessment integration logic. Before auto-integrating any analyst verdict from an assessment file, check closed-issues.json for verdict-change issues on that prediction_id closed within the last 30 days. Skip and flag if found. This is urgent — the regression has now triggered 3 times.

Curmudgeon c4 review of EXP-190-proposal.json found two major blocking issues: (1) near-identity transform rule has no operational test (ISS-1241); (2) Sydney-Perth §4.3.1 citation is unverifiable (ISS-1242). Decider cannot resolve these — they require human group review per ISS-1205 hold.
